changes.description: Created composite Performance Review (Final Gate) skill with YAML frontmatter, 6-step deterministic procedure (Scope+Intent, Code Review, Contract Compliance, Security/OWASP, PRR-lite, Validation Baseline), 7-axis scoring rubric (0-2 each, pass >= 11/14), multi-agent safety rules, and structured output format.

Updated Step 3 (Focused Manual Pass → Performance Review Final Gate) to use performance-review.md as the primary final-gate procedure. Updated Step 4 (Verdict) to reference the scoring rubric pass/warn/fail thresholds.
